title: potentilla × scardicola
intro: Potentilla × scardicola, also known as the scardicola potentilla or cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant species derived from the potentilla genus, typically characterized by its pink, white, or yellow five-petaled flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of potentilla × scardicola include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and microbial infections. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
